tagline: AI-native finance automation platform for Japanese enterprises.
description: LayerX provides a finance automation platform with integrated modules for accounts payable, accounts receivable, expense management, corporate cards, workflow management, and time and attendance, using AI/ML to automate invoice processing, payment matching, and approval workflows for enterprises in Japan.

tagline: Grow is a mental health platform for personal and professional growth, built to enable progress, connecting clients, providers, and businesses through clinical expertise, always-on tools, and deep insights.
description: Grow Therapy is a leading behavioral healthcare platform modernizing access to mental health services, expanding access to in-network mental healthcare by connecting patients, payors, and independent providers through a tech-enabled three-sided network. Grow supports clinicians with an end-to-end suite (including EHR and practice management) and operates a marketplace that helps patients discover and access in-network clinicians at negotiated rates with major payors.

tagline: Full-stack banking* and financial operations platform for entrepreneurs.
description: Mercury provides a digitally native banking* platform for businesses in the US, integrating checking and savings, corporate cards, bill pay, invoicing, expense management, treasury, lending, and payroll into a single system built around the bank account. *Mercury is a fintech company, not an FDIC-insured bank. Banking services provided through Choice Financial Group and Column N.A., Members FDIC. The IO Card is issued by Patriot Bank, N.A., Member FDIC, pursuant to a license from Mastercard International Incorporated.

tagline: AI-native commercial insurance carrier and full-stack platform.
description: Corgi is a licensed, AI-native commercial insurance carrier that owns the full stack across underwriting, claims, and policy administration. By rebuilding its systems from scratch using large language models, Corgi replaces legacy manual processes to deliver faster policy quoting, flexible product design, and an improved experience for embedded distribution partners and end-customers.

tagline: Intelligence-Led Revenue platform built around persistent per-account AI agents.
description: Actively AI is building an Intelligence-Led Revenue platform for go-to-market teams. Its architecture assigns a persistent AI agent to every account, continuously building context from a company’s proprietary data, identifying what matters, and helping teams decide and execute next steps across the revenue lifecycle. The result is a compounding layer of institutional intelligence that helps revenue organizations operate with greater speed and precision.

tagline: A cloud-native artifact management platform that provides a secure, organized, and accessible system for storing, managing, and deploying software artifacts
description: Cloudsmith's cloud-native artifact management platform serves as a central hub for software development, ensuring the integrity and availability of artifacts, and offers a SaaS alternative to legacy on-premise solutions.

tagline: Full-stack financial management and accounting platform for SMBs and their accounting firms in France.
description: Pennylane connects business owners with their CPAs via a comprehensive platform for accounting, procurement, accounts payable, mobile banking, corporate cards, tax management, and e-invoicing, leveraging AI to streamline key workflows and collaborative processes.

tagline: Believe is one of the world’s leading digital music companies.
description: Believe’s mission is to develop independent artists and labels in the digital world by providing them the solutions they need to grow their audience at each stage of their career and development. Believe’s passionate team of digital music experts around the world leverages the Group’s global technology platform to advise artists and labels, distribute, and promote their music.

tagline: Silver Peak® is the global leader in broadband and hybrid WAN solutions.
description: Silver Peak, the global SD-WAN leader, delivers the transformational promise of the cloud with a business-first networking model. The Unity EdgeConnect™ self-driving wide area network platform liberates enterprises from conventional WAN approaches to transform the network into a business accelerant. EdgeConnect replaces routers, unifying SD-WAN, firewall, segmentation, routing, WAN optimization and application visibility and control in a single platform. EdgeConnect continuously learns and adapts to meet the requirements of the business, delivering the highest quality of experience to enterprise users and IT organizations. Silver Peak was acquired by Hewlett Packard Enterprise in 2020.

tagline: Vectra is a leader in network detection and response.
description: Vectra is a leader in network detection and response – from cloud and data center workloads to user and IoT devices. Its Cognito platform accelerates threat detection and investigation using AI to enrich network metadata it collects and stores with the right context to detect, hunt and investigate known and unknown threats in real time. Vectra offers three applications on the Cognito platform to address high-priority use cases. Cognito Stream sends security-enriched metadata to data lakes and SIEMs. Cognito Recall is a cloud-based application to store and investigate threats in enriched metadata. And Cognito Detect uses AI to reveal and prioritize hidden and unknown attackers at speed.

tagline: Cradlepoint is a global leader in cloud-delivered edge solutions for 4G LTE and 5G enabled networks.
description: Cradlepoint is a global leader in cloud-delivered wireless edge solutions for branch, mobile, and IoT networks. The Cradlepoint Elastic Edge™ vision — powered by NetCloud services — provides a blueprint for agile, pervasive and software-driven wireless WANs that leverage 4G and 5G services to connect people, places and things everywhere with resiliency, security, and control. Major service providers use Cradlepoint wireless solutions as the foundation for innovative managed network services. Cradlepoint was acquired by Ericsson in 2020.

tagline: Devo is a cloud-native logging and security analytics company.
description: Devo provides a cloud-based, multi-tenant security information and event management (SIEM) platform that collects and analyzes an enterprise’s machine, business, and log data to provide real-time security insight for both security and IT operations professionals.

tagline: Nasuni enables enterprise users to access, protect, synchronize, and collaborate on unstructured data stored in the cloud
description: Nasuni is a SaaS data management product integrated with public and private clouds. Nasuni’s platform allows enterprises to index unstructured data into a file system, leveraging the cost and elasticity benefits of the cloud but the performance and usability of on-prem file storage.

tagline: OneTrust technology powers privacy, security, and governance programs.
description: OneTrust is the category-defining enterprise platform to operationalize trust. Customers use OneTrust to make trust a competitive differentiator, implementing central agile workflows across privacy, security, data governance, GRC, third-party risk, ethics and compliance, and ESG programs.

tagline: Venafi is the leading provider of machine identity protection.
description: Venafi is a cybersecurity market leader in machine identity management, securing machine-to-machine connections and communications. Venafi delivers innovative solutions for the world’s most demanding, security-conscious Global 5000 organizations and government agencies. Venafi was acquired by CyberArk (NASDAQ: CYBR) in 2024.

tagline: Aviatrix is a leader in cloud networking and network security.
description: Aviatrix delivers advanced cloud networking, network security and operational visibility required by enterprises with cloud-native simplicity and automation. Customers worldwide leverage Aviatrix and its proven multi-cloud network reference architecture to design, deploy and operate a repeatable network and security architecture that is consistent across any public cloud. Combined with the industry’s first and only multi-cloud networking certification (ACE), Aviatrix is empowering IT to lead and accelerate the transformation to the cloud.

tagline: HashiCorp is a leader in cloud infrastructure automation software.
description: HashiCorp is a leader in multi-cloud infrastructure automation software. The HashiCorp software suite enables organizations to adopt consistent workflows and a standardized approach to automating the critical process involved in delivering applications in the cloud: infrastructure provisioning, security, networking, and application deployment. Enterprise and managed service versions of these products enhance the open source tools with features that promote collaboration, operations, governance, and multi-datacenter functionality. The company is headquartered in San Francisco, though many HashiCorp employees work remotely, strategically distributed around the globe. HashiCorp went public in 2021 on the NASDAQ Stock Market (NASDAQ: HCP).

tagline: Instacart is a 3P grocery digital marketplace and grocery enterprise platform.
description: Instacart is one of the largest 3P grocery digital marketplace and grocery enterprise platforms, partnering with many of the US’s top grocers. Aside from the marketplace, it also has an enterprise platform (online websites, in-store tech, fulfillment, data insights etc.) and a scaled advertising platform primarily for CPG brands.

tagline: An end-to-end digital MSK clinic.
description: Hinge Health is building a patient-centered Digital Musculoskeletal (MSK) Clinic™. Hinge Health reduces MSK pain, surgeries, and opioid use by pairing advanced wearable sensors and computer vision technology with a comprehensive clinical care team of physical therapists, physicians, and board-certified health coaches. Hinge Health’s HingeConnect integrates with in-person providers and enables real-time interventions for elective MSK surgeries, driving proven medical claims reduction. Hinge Health went public in May 2025 on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: HNGE).

tagline: Sojern is a leading provider of digital marketing solutions for the travel industry.
description: Sojern is a leading digital marketing platform built for travel marketers. Powered by artificial intelligence and traveler intent data, Sojern provides multi-channel marketing solutions to drive direct demand. Hotels, attractions, tourism boards and travel marketers rely on Sojern annually to engage and convert travelers around the world.

tagline: Toast is a restaurant point of sale and management system that helps restaurants improve operations, increase sales and create a better guest experience.
description: Toast powers successful restaurants of all sizes with a technology platform that combines restaurant POS, front of house, back of house and guest-facing technology with a diverse marketplace of third-party applications. By pairing technology with an unrivaled commitment to customer success, Toast helps restaurants streamline operations, increase revenue and deliver amazing guest experiences. Toast went public in 2021 on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: TOST).

tagline: AI-powered engineering-grade digital twin and grid simulation platform for electric utilities.
description: Neara provides an engineering-grade 3D digital twin for electric utilities, combining data from LiDAR, GIS, CAD and more with physics-based simulation to help model, analyze, and optimize grid design, resilience, and asset management.

tagline: OneSource Virtual supports solution delivery exclusively for Workday.
description: OneSource Virtual (OSV) is a leading Workday partner and pioneer of Business Process as a Service (BPaaS), providing automated payroll, HR, tax, and treasury solutions to Workday customers. OSV's tech-enabled "in-tenant" delivery model automates complex payroll, tax, and benefits processes, and the company has expanded into fintech offerings including earned wage access and automated accounts payable.

tagline: Revolut is an innovative financial superapp on a mission to unlock the power of a borderless economy, for everyone.
description: Revolut aims to transform the way money works. As an innovative, new financial superapp, Revolut gives people the power to spend, invest and transfer money seamlessly and without the high fees charged by traditional banks. Since launching in 2015 in the U.K., Revolut has expanded significantly beyond its origins as an FX product, adding new features all the time, including Budgeting and Analytics, Business Accounts, Junior Accounts, Commission-Free Stock Trading, Cryptocurrencies, and much, much more.

tagline: AI engineering platform for development, observability, and evaluation.
description: Arize provides production ML analytics and workflows to quickly catch model and data issues, diagnose the root cause, and continuously improve performance for products and business.

tagline: Albert Invent is a provider of end-to-end R&D lifecycle software for large chemical and materials manufacturers.
description: Albert Invent provides an end-to-end cloud-based suite for the R&D and new product teams at chemicals and materials manufacturers. The platform is underpinned by the centralization and digitization of all of the customer’s experiment and inventory data, serving as the central system of record and operations across the entire R&D team.

tagline: Perceptyx provides employee surveys and people analytics to help companies thrive.
description: Since its formation, Perceptyx has been revolutionizing the employee survey and people analytics industry, delivering enterprise-level employee surveys and people analytics. With an innovative technology platform and a tailor-made, flexible approach, the Perceptyx technology makes it easy for managers and HR or business leaders to discover insights deep within large and complex organizations, driving meaningful action to improve business outcomes. Driven by a deep intellectual curiosity and culture of innovation, Perceptyx is challenging the status quo – to help people and organizations thrive. Perceptyx acquired Humu in 2023.

tagline: Backbone is a mobile gaming controller and app providing a unified experience to launch games, game services, streaming, and in-app chat across multiple platforms from a user’s phone.
description: Category creating mobile gaming controller offering a high fidelity, console-like experience on mobile, as well as providing an app to launch games, game services, and stream

tagline: Healthie is a next-generation, cloud-based practice management platform and electronic health record for digital health companies and SMB private practices.
description: Healthie’s open, configurable, and modern platform for digital health companies is changing EHR and practice management, with a focus on capabilities around virtual first care, care collaboration, and longitudinal relationships.

tagline: A marketplace and workforce management platform for skilled temporary workers, bringing flexible work to hourly workers at scale.
description: Instawork makes it easy for employers to list shifts and for workers to discover and book them, along with facilitating payment and creating trust with transparent/public performance management for both sides. Its digital marketplace connects thousands of businesses and more than four million workers, filling a critical role in local economies.
tcv_perspective: We have a deep belief at TCV that strong and fitting company cultures result in great experiences for customers. While learning about Instawork, we heard that the team had a saying “Inches off at launch means miles off in orbit.” It’s exactly this detail orientation and product obsession that we think can give rise to a novel marketplace platform for hourly work. We’re incredibly excited to partner with the Instawork team on their mission to shape the future of work.

tagline: Roofr is an all-in-one platform for roofing companies to run their businesses.
description: Founded by a third-generation roofing contractor, Roofr competes in two separate but related functions serving roofing companies —measurement reports, which are integral to the quoting and job pricing process, and sales/business management software, including CRM and payments

tagline: Spotify is the world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service with millions of users and subscribers around the world.
description: Spotify transformed music listening forever when it launched in 2008. Discover, manage and share millions of tracks for free, or upgrade to Spotify Premium to access exclusive features for music including improved sound quality and an on-demand, offline, and ad-free listening experience. Today, Spotify is the world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service. Spotify went public in 2018 on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: SPOT).

tagline: GoFundMe is the world’s largest social fundraising platform.
description: GoFundMe is the largest global fundraising platform that empowers people to give and receive help. GoFundMe is building a global support system that creates an opportunity for everyone to thrive.

tagline: All-in-one cloud-based practice management platform for dental practices that unifies clinical, business, and patient engagement operations.
description: Archy provides an all-in-one dental practice management platform with integrated modules for clinical charting, imaging, treatment planning, scheduling, insurance claims management, patient billing/payments, automated patient communications, and analytics, with AI-powered features to streamline practice operations.

tagline: Democratizing access to nutrition care.
description: Nourish connects chronic disease patients with a registered dietitian (RD) via telehealth and helps them get their consultations covered by health insurance, creating a win-win-win for patients, providers, and payers.

tagline: Strava is a leading social platform for athletes.
description: Strava is a leading social platform for athletes and the largest sports community in the world. It gives athletes a simple, fun ways to stay motivated and compete against themselves and others without having to be in the same place at the same time.

tagline: Avalara is a provider of transactional tax compliance automation software for businesses of all sizes.
description: Avalara offers a suite of transactional compliance solutions that enable businesses to address the complexity of transaction tax compliance; process transactions in real time; produce detailed records of transaction tax determinations; and reduce errors, audit exposure, and total transaction tax compliance costs. The company went public in 2018 on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: AVLR).

tagline: Rave Mobile Safety provides the leading critical communication and data platform trusted to help save lives.
description: Rave Mobile Safety is the leading provider of critical communication and collaboration technology used to save lives, manage crisis incidents and increase resiliency. From major disasters and crisis events to everyday emergencies and operational incidents, the Rave platform enables critical data sharing, mass notification and emergency response coordination. First responders, emergency management, 9-1-1, and federal, state and local agencies—as well as corporations, healthcare organizations, universities and schools—rely on Rave to prepare better, respond faster, recover quicker and mitigate anticipated critical incidents. Rave Mobile Safety was acquired by Motorola Solutions in 2022.

tagline: Clio is committed to building cloud-based and client-centered technology that will transform the legal experience for all.
description: Clio empowers lawyers to be both client-centered and firm focused through a suite of cloud-based solutions, including legal practice management, client intake, and legal CRM software.

tagline: Oversight is a global leader in AI-powered spend management technology.
description: Oversight is how finance organizations use AI to tackle hidden spend risk in everything from T&E to payables. Instead of manually auditing a small sample of past spend, Oversight customers, can automatically analyze 100% of current spend and see the actions they need to take now. Oversight makes sure nothing gets by you with its see it all, spot the patterns, steer the future approach. It’s how Oversight helps companies identify 98% of all errors before payment is even released. With Oversight, Nothing Gets by You Now.

tagline: Spryker is a fast-growing commerce technology for global enterprises.
description: Spryker enables companies to build transactional business models in B2B, B2C, and Enterprise Marketplaces. Spryker is the most modern platform-as-a-service solution with a headless architecture that is cloud-enabled, enterprise-ready, and loved by developers and business users worldwide. Spryker customers extend their sales reach and grow revenue with a system that allows them to increase operational efficiency, lower total cost of ownership, and expand to new markets and business models faster than ever before.

tagline: Redis makes apps faster, by creating a data layer for a real-time world.
description: Redis makes apps faster, by creating a data layer for a real-time world. We are the sponsor of the open source Redis project, the world’s most loved in-memory database, and deliver Redis Enterprise, a real-time data platform. Developers rely on Redis to build performance, scalability, reliability, and security into their applications. Born in the cloud-native era, Redis uniquely enables users to unify data across multi-cloud, hybrid and global applications to maximize business potential.

tagline: FarEye is a leading end-to-end, global delivery management platform.
description: FarEye’s Intelligent Delivery Management Platform is making deliveries better for everyone. FarEye enables enterprises to deliver goods at reduced cost with a superior customer experience. The SaaS platform leverages millions of data points to predict the shipment journey and orchestrate the delivery experience across the first mile, mid-mile and last mile of the journey. FarEye’s unique low-code approach provides an environment to develop applications with a quick turn-around time and minimal code to shorten the “concept to ship” cycle. FarEye provides one of the strongest networks of FTL carriers in Asia, fast growing in USA and EMEA and is currently integrated with millions of networks of vehicles through telematics integrations with OEM fitted devices, and has been recently recognized as a challenger in the 2021 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Real-Time Transportation Visibility Platforms.

tagline: Dream Sports is a leading sports technology company in India.
description: Dream Sports’ portfolio of brands include Dream11, India’s largest fantasy sports platform, FanCode, a premier digital sports platform that personalizes content and commerce for all sports fans, DreamX, a sports accelerator, DreamSetGo, a sports experiences platform, and DreamPay, a payment solutions provider. Founded by Harsh Jain and Bhavit Sheth, Dream Sports is always working on its mission to ‘Make Sports Better.’ The team founded the Dream Sports Foundation to help and champion sportspeople and is an active member of the Federation of Indian Fantasy Sports, the nodal body for the Fantasy Sports industry in India.

tagline: Darwinbox is a cloud-native core HR platform focused on large enterprises.
description: Darwinbox’s cloud-native Human Capital Management (HCM) platform caters to an organization’s talent needs across the entire employee lifecycle, including Core HR (attendance, leave, directory), Recruitment, Onboarding, Travel and Expenses, Employee Engagement, Payroll, Performance Management, and People Analytics, among others. Darwinbox’s platform combines highly configurable workflows, intelligent insights, and intuitive user interface to help enterprises unlock the true potential of their workforce.

tagline: Ankorstore is the first marketplace that connects brands and creators with shops all over Europe.
description: Ankorstore was founded by entrepreneurs for entrepreneurs and is a partner to many retailers, florists, coffee-shops and other concept-stores across Europe - seeking authentic products and brands that e-commerce giants such as Amazon do not offer. The Ankorstore marketplace offers a product catalogue of European brands to retailers who want to offer their customers a differentiated shopping experience and new products.

tagline: Talend is a global provider of data integration and data integrity
description: Talend offers a unified suite of cloud applications that enables organizations to collect, transform, govern, and share data in order to make better strategic decisions, enhance customer experience, and drive long-term business value.

tagline: Aidoc is the leading provider of healthcare AI solutions.
description: Aidoc’s AI Care Platform—the first of its kind—offers health systems a singular platform solution that works with physicians to manage the entire patient lifecycle—from diagnostic aid, to consultation to suggested treatment paths to patient follow-up tools.

tagline: Digital navigation platform offering a comprehensive suite of mission-critical tools for outdoor enthusiasts to plan and execute their pursuits.
description: onX provides detailed mapping with proprietary land ownership data, customizable waypoints, weather overlays, offline functionality, and GPS tracking for outdoor pursuits such as hunting, off-roading, fishing, and backcountry exploration.

tagline: Klarna is a leading global payments and shopping service.
description: With Klarna, consumers can buy now and pay later, so they can get what they need today. Klarna’s offering to consumers and retailers includes payments, social shopping and personal finances. Thousands of retail partners have enabled Klarna’s innovative shopping experience online and in-store. Klarna went public in September 2025 on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: KLAR).

tagline: Cognite is a global leader in industrial software innovation.
description: Cognite is a global industrial SaaS company that supports the full-scale digital transformation of asset-heavy industries around the world. Cognite Data Fusion, enables data and domain users to collaborate to quickly and safely develop, operationalize and scale industrial AI solutions & applications. Cognite Data Fusion codifies industrial domain knowledge into Industrial DataOps software that fits into existing ecosystems and enables scale from proofs of concepts to truly data-driven operations to deliver both profitability and sustainability.

tagline: ETQ is the leading provider of EHS, compliance and quality management software, trusted by the world’s strongest brands.
description: ETQ is the leading Quality, EHS, Operational Risk and Compliance management software provider for identifying, mitigating and preventing high-risk events through integration, automation and collaboration. At the core of ETQ’s framework is a compliance management platform that enables organizations to implement best-in-class compliance processes configured to meet their existing processes, create new compliance processes and automate and control their compliance ecosystem. ETQ was founded in 1992 and was acquired by Hexagon in 2022.

tagline: GitLab is a single application for the DevOps lifecycle.
description: GitLab is a DevOps platform built from the ground up as a single application for all stages of the DevOps lifecycle enabling Product, Development, QA, Security, and Operations teams to work concurrently on the same project. GitLab provides a single data store, one user interface, and one permission model across the DevOps lifecycle. This allows teams to significantly reduce cycle times through more efficient collaboration and enhanced focus. Built on Open Source, GitLab works alongside its growing community, which is composed of thousands of developers and millions of users, to continuously deliver new DevOps innovations. GitLab went public in 2021 on the NASDAQ Stock Market (NASDAQ: GTLB).

tagline: Avetta is a leader in cloud-based supply chain risk management.
description: Avetta connects global organizations across several industries including oil/gas, telecom, construction materials, facilities management and many others, with qualified and vetted suppliers, contractors and vendors. The company brings unmatched access and visibility to its clients’ supply chain risk management process through its innovative and configurable technology, coupled with highly experienced human knowledge and insight. Avetta contributes to the advancement of its clients’ sustainable growth by protecting supply chains from a wide range of potential risks through trusted contractor pre-qualification, safety training and monitoring, regulatory compliance, insurance/financial stability and other areas of risk.

tagline: Attentive is a mobile messaging and marketing platform.
description: Attentive is creating the world’s most comprehensive performance marketing solution for engaging the mobile-first customer. Using real-time behavioral data, Attentive automatically sends engaging SMS and MMS messages at every step of the customer lifecycle. Many leading businesses rely on Attentive for industry-leading marketing performance and ROI.

tagline: LegalZoom is a leading provider of legal solutions for small businesses and families.
description: LegalZoom is a leading online platform for legal and compliance solutions in the United States that is on a mission to democratize law. Driven by its core value that every business deserves the full protection of the legal system and a simple way to stay compliant with it, LegalZoom helps its customers form and protect their businesses, their ideas and families. In addition to business formations, LegalZoom offers ongoing compliance and tax advice, trademark and copyright filings and estate planning documents to protect small businesses and the families that create them. LegalZoom went public in 2021 on the NASDAQ Stock Market (NASDAQ: LZ).

tagline: Global leader in omnichannel customer experience and contact center solutions.
description: Genesys provides a customer experience and contact center platform with integrated capabilities spanning omnichannel routing, workforce engagement management, customer journey orchestration, predictive engagement, and real-time analytics, using AI and automation to enable personalized customer interactions across voice, chat, email, social media, and digital channels for enterprises globally.

tagline: Cloud-native, comprehensive software platform for fire and EMS agencies designed to manage the complete incident lifecycle and core administrative operations.
description: First Due provides a suite of integrated modules to manage the full scope of fire and EMS operations, including tools for pre-incident planning, mobile response, post-incident reporting, and administrative workflows such as scheduling, training, and asset management.

tagline: A manufacturing intelligence platform that uses AI and AR to turn operational expertise into real-time guidance for frontline workers.
description: Squint provides an AI and AR-powered manufacturing intelligence platform with tools including a conversational assistant, AR-guided procedures, and computer vision verification for operational workflows such as machine troubleshooting, maintenance, and frontline worker training.

tagline: Fully integrated practice management system (PMS) and electronic health record (EHR) platform serving the most critical business and charting workflows required to run a SMB health & wellness practice.
description: Jane offers fully integrated modules spanning online bookings & patient engagement, appointment scheduling & related staff workflows, telehealth, charting / medical documentation, reporting and analytics, payments processing, and insurance filing.

tagline: Klook is a world-leading travel and leisure booking platform.
description: Klook empowers users around the world to discover and book the best experiences and services anywhere, anytime. The company provides a seamless way for users to explore popular attractions, tours, local transportation, food and beverage, and unique experiences at home or around the world on Klook’s website and award-winning app.

tagline: Peloton is a leading interactive fitness platform.
Hotmart is a global cloud-based platform that empowers creators to build, run, manage, and grow their digital businesses.
description: Hotmart is one of the world’s leading digital enablement platforms with a diverse and fast-growing ecosystem of creators and consumers. Its all-in-one, cloud-based technology platform integrates the features and functionalities that creators of all sizes need to build, run, manage, and grow their digital businesses.

tagline: Rover is the world’s largest online marketplace for pet care.
description: Rover connects pet parents with pet providers who offer overnight services, including boarding and in-home pet sitting, as well as daytime services, including doggy daycare, dog walking, drop-in visits, and grooming. Rover makes it easier for people to have pet love in their lives through the Rover Guarantee, 24/7 support, vet consultations, and GPS walk mapping. And by sharing expertise on TheDogPeople.com—one of the world’s top pet blogs—Rover provides tips and articles that delight, inform, and enhance the bond between people and their pets. Rover went public in 2021 on the NASDAQ Stock Market (NASDAQ: ROVR).

tagline: ByteDance focuses on the future of content discovery and creation.
description: ByteDance’s mission is to inspire creativity and enrich life. With a suite of more than a dozen products, including TikTok, Helo, and Resso, as well as platforms specific to the China market, including Toutiao, Douyin, and Xigua, ByteDance has made it easier and more fun for people to connect with, consume, and create content.

tagline: Nubank offers new financial solutions and experiences for individuals and SMEs that are simple, intuitive, convenient, low-cost, empowering, and human.
description: Nubank is one of the world’s largest digital financial services platforms, serving millions of customers across Brazil, Mexico, and Colombia. As one of the leading technology companies in the world, Nu leverages proprietary technologies and innovative business practices to create new financial solutions and experiences for individuals and SMEs that are simple, intuitive, convenient, low-cost, empowering, and human. Guided by its mission, Nu is fostering access to financial services across Latin America. Nubank went public in 2021 on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: NU).

tagline: Corporate cards and spend management teams actually love.
description: Brex is a one-stop-shop platform that helps companies manage their full suite of financial services. Brex helps companies spend, save, and earn smarter—and take every dollar further—by doing more than a bank, bookkeeping, or reward program could ever do alone. Brex primarily serves small and medium sized businesses (SMBs) today and is onboarding new clients with an increasingly diverse offering of new products and services.

tagline: Adevinta is a leading online classifieds group operating marketplaces across the globe.
description: Adevinta enables consumers to discover and purchase a wide range of goods and services, from real estate and cars to jobs and consumer goods such as clothes, electronics, furniture, garden equipment and much more.

tagline: Netflix is one of the world's leading entertainment services with millions of paid memberships enjoying TV series, films and games across a wide variety of genres and languages.
description: Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services with TV series, documentaries and feature films across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can watch as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, on any internet-connected screen. Members can play, pause and resume watching, all without commercials or commitments. Netflix went public in 2002 on the NASDAQ Stock Market (NASDAQ: NFLX).

tagline: Powerful financial tools to help you grow and manage your money.
description: Wealthsimple is a financial company on a mission to help everyone achieve financial freedom by providing products and advice that are accessible and affordable. Using smart technology, Wealthsimple takes financial services that are often confusing, opaque and expensive and makes them simple, transparent, and low-cost.

tagline: Airbnb connects people to unique travel experiences.
description: Airbnb is one of the world’s largest marketplaces for unique, authentic places to stay and things to do, all powered by local hosts. An economic empowerment engine, Airbnb has helped millions of hospitality entrepreneurs monetize their spaces and their passions while keeping the financial benefits of tourism in their own communities. Airbnb promotes people-to-people connection, community, and trust around the world. Airbnb went public in 2020 on the NASDAQ Stock Market (NASDAQ: ABNB).

tagline: An all-in-one next generation cloud security platform
description: Upwind's CNAPP offering enables DevOps and Security teams to understand and respond to threats in their cloud environments. Upwind’s CNAPP consolidates several security product categories, including cloud security posture management (CSPM), cloud workload protection (CWPP), and API security.

tagline: An agentless micro-segmentation solution that allows enterprises to better understand and secure their networks
description: Elisity’s agentless micro-segmentation solution provides in-depth network visibility, simplified segmentation, robust policy management, and precise access control. Elisity’s offering can be deployed across existing infrastructure in hours vs. months, delivering time and cost savings over alternatives.

tagline: Passport is a modern international shipping carrier built for ecommerce DTC brands and marketplaces.
description: Passport is a modern international shipping carrier that helps e-commerce merchants instantly unlock a global customer base by managing the digital, logistical, and regulatory complexities of cross-border shipping. The company also offers end consumers door-to-door tracking and high-touch customer support on all packages being sent around the world. Traditional international carriers (e.g., FedEx, DHL) own and operate physical delivery assets, yet Passport’s end-to-end shipping service is provided through an asset-light model and currently uses their network to deliver parcels globally.

tagline: BenchSci empowers scientists with the world’s most advanced biomedical AI to run more successful experiments.
description: BenchSci helps scientists make breakthrough discoveries and bring new treatments to patients faster. BenchSci’s platform empowers scientists globally to optimize their experiment designs and research productivity.

tagline: Legit Security helps enterprises secure their organization’s software supply chain.
description: Legit Security protects software supply chains from attack by automatically discovering and securing the pipelines, infrastructure, code and people so that businesses can stay safe while releasing software fast. Legit provides an easy to implement SaaS solution that supports both cloud and on-premises resources and combines automated discovery and analysis capabilities with hundreds of security policies developed by industry experts with real-world SDLC security experience. This integrated solution keeps your software factory secure and provides continuous assurance that your applications are released without vulnerabilities.

tagline: Nagomi is a platform designed to optimize, measure, and maximize the ROI of new and existing security tools.
description: Nagomi’s Proactive Defense Platform makes it possible to optimize, measure, and maximize the ROI of new and existing security tools. Nagomi addresses critical security coverage gaps by mapping customers’ security tools to the threats they care about and provides prescriptive remediation plans to security practitioners. This solution supports multiple modules from a single platform.

tagline: Syllable is a leading health system call center solution that empowers patients and eases operational burdens.
description: Syllable removes communication barriers between patients and the care they need, when they need it. Syllable leverages artificial intelligence and natural language understanding (NLU) to meet patients where they are — phone, web, and SMS — and continues to improve from every patient interaction.

tagline: Addressing security’s pervasive data problem to help teams make faster, more accurate decisions.
description: Avalor takes aim at security’s pervasive data problem through a unique data fabric that acts as a source of truth for assets, controls, identities, vulnerabilities, security bugs, and other related data points. The company’s data fabric automates what has traditionally been a highly manual process, significantly reducing the total number of critical vulnerabilities (often from tens of thousands to hundreds) and facilitating faster remediation across IT, DevOps, and Security.
tcv_perspective: At TCV, we gravitate towards founders that are culture and product obsessed. Raanan and Kfir blend humility with a deep understanding of solving data problems at scale, and we look forward to supporting them on the journey ahead.

tagline: Reforge is a leading career development platform for professionals in Growth, Product, Marketing and Engineering.
description: Reforge works with leaders of fast-growing innovative companies to teach frontier topics to today’s emerging leaders. The company’s content, community, experience, and brand combine into a unique product offering that creates unparalleled access to insights. Reforge membership combines cohort-based programs with year-round access to the highest caliber of content and community.

tagline: Intelligent contract management.
description: Evisort delivers end-to-end contract intelligence software that turns contracts into data. Customers use a simple, intuitive interface to extract critical context from contracts, integrate that data into other enterprise systems, and automate a wide range of legal and operational workflows – themselves codified in contract data. Evisort’s platform is powered by award-winning AI that is purpose-built for contracts and trained on millions of documents, thereby driving a differentiated customer experience and rapid, tangible ROI.

tagline: Kipu is the leading enterprise software provider serving the mental health and substance use communities.
description: Kipu Health is the leading technology partner for mental health and substance use disorder (SUD) service providers and is passionate about empowering caregivers and patients on every step of the recovery journey. Kipu’s innovative applications and services help care providers achieve the best outcomes across all levels of care, improving the individual, community, and public health. The company’s flagship electronic medical records system, KipuEMR, is purpose-built and trusted by care centers that operate facilities nationwide. KipuEMR is delivered as a fully integrated platform with Kipu’s CRM and Revenue Cycle Management solutions.

tagline: Zillow is a real estate and rental marketplace.
description: Zillow Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: Z and ZG) is reimagining real estate to make it easier to unlock life’s next chapter. As the most-visited real estate website in the United States, Zillow® and its affiliates offer customers an on-demand experience for selling, buying, renting or financing with transparency and nearly seamless end-to-end service.

tagline: Watermark is the largest provider of educational intelligence software for colleges and universities worldwide.
description: At Watermark, insights inspire progress. Watermark’s software gives higher education institutions the insights they need to improve, evolve, and empower student success. Watermark’s integrated digital solutions support assessment and accreditation, faculty activity reporting, course evaluation and surveys, and catalog and curriculum development.

tagline: Employment Hero is a provider of human resources information system and payroll software focused on the SME segment
description: Employment Hero has emerged as a market leader in Australia on the back of an easy-to-use, cloud-native and comprehensive HR and payroll offering and is in the early stages of expanding internationally in the UK, New Zealand and Southeast Asia. The Company’s suite of offerings includes the core HR system of record, recruitment, onboarding, time & attendance, employee engagement and performance management.

tagline: CCC is digitizing the multi-trillion-dollar insurance economy.
description: CCC Intelligent Solutions is a leading SaaS platform for the multi-trillion-dollar P&C insurance economy powering operations for insurers, repairers, automakers, part suppliers, lenders, and more. The company's multi-tenant cloud technology connects businesses, providing a single connected platform digitizing mission-critical workflows, commerce, and customer experiences. The CCC Cloud processes billions of transactions daily delivering data and insights that automate and inform decision-making, enhance productivity, and help customers deliver faster and better experiences for end consumers. Through its advanced AI, IoT, and mobile capabilities, CCC is accelerating the industry's digital transformation. CCC went public in 2021 on the NASDAQ Stock Market (NASDAQ: CCCS).

tagline: Mambu is a market-leading SaaS banking platform.
description: Mambu is the market-leading SaaS cloud banking platform. The company fast-tracks the design and build of nearly any type of financial product for banks, lenders, fintechs, retailers, telcos and more. Mambu’s unique composable approach means that independent components, systems and connectors can be configured any way clients require to meet their customer’s needs.

tagline: Datto provides data backup and recovery solutions.
description: Datto protects essential business data for tens of thousands of the world’s fastest growing companies. The company’s Total Data Protection platform delivers uninterrupted access to data on-site, in transit, and in the cloud. Through its network of partners, Datto provides companies with products and services designed to keep their businesses running continually. Thousands of IT service providers globally rely on Datto for industry-leading technology combined with unrivaled customer service. Datto was acquired by Vista Equity Partners in 2017.

tagline: Alarm.com is the leading platform for the intelligently connected property.
description: Consumers and businesses depend on Alarm.com's technology to manage and control their property from anywhere. The company's platform integrates with a growing variety of Internet of Things (IoT) devices through apps and interfaces. Alarm.com's security, video, access control, intelligent automation, energy management, and wellness solutions are available through a network of professional service providers in North America and around the globe. Alarm.com went public in 2015 on the NASDAQ Stock Market (NASDAQ: ALRM).

tagline: Razorpay is a full-stack financial services company.
description: Razorpay helps Indian businesses with comprehensive and innovative solutions built over robust technology to address the entire length and breadth of the payment and banking journey. The company provides technology payment solutions to millions of businesses.

tagline: Trade Republic is one of the largest mobile investment, wealth, and savings platform in Europe.
description: Trade Republic was founded with a mission to democratize access to investing and ultimately become the leading pan-European wealth management platform. Trade Republic is a technology company with a German banking license supervised by the Bundesbank and BaFin. Trade Republic has customers who enjoy commission-free investing in equities and crypto as well as free ETF and factional stock savings plan.

tagline: Teya was founded in 2019 with the goal to create payment and software solutions that can help small and medium-sized businesses to better manage and grow their operations.
description: Teya was founded with the goal to create payment and software solutions that can help small and medium-sized businesses to better manage and grow their operations. Alongside their solution for local businesses, they also offer a range of other services and software such as issuer payment processing, cloud-native payments and business management Software-as-a-Service to global FinTechs, payment providers, banks, and mobile network operators. Teya (fka SaltPay) acquired Retail Merchant Services in 2021.

tagline: Sportradar is a leading global provider of sports betting and sports entertainment products and services.
description: Sportradar (NASDAQ: SRAD) is a leading global sports technology company creating immersive experiences for sports fans and bettors. Positioned at the intersection of the sports, media and betting industries, the company provides sports federations, news media, consumer platforms and sports betting operators with a best-in-class range of solutions to help grow their business. With deep industry relationships and expertise, Sportradar is not just redefining the sports fan experience, it also safeguards sports through its Integrity Services division and advocacy for an integrity-driven environment for all involved.

tagline: Retail Merchant Services (RMS) is an award-winning payments services company.
description: Retail Merchant Services provide thousands of small to medium-sized businesses across the U.K. and Ireland with reliable, secure and tech-driven payment solutions to help them accept card payments, grow their businesses and retain more customers. Retail Merchant Services offers a host of products and services to help small business owners, including: credit and debit card machines with Same Day Settlement, EPOS systems, Merchant Cash Advance, E-commerce Gateways, Pay by Link & Virtual Terminals. Retail Merchant Services was acquired by Teya (fka SaltPay) in 2021.

tagline: GoodRx is a provider of prescription drug discounts nationwide.
description: GoodRx helps Americans get the healthcare they need at a price they can afford. As America's leading resource for healthcare savings, GoodRx connects consumers with affordable and convenient prescriptions and medical care, including telehealth, mail order prescriptions, doctor visits, and lab tests. GoodRx went public in 2020 on the NASDAQ Stock Market (NASDAQ: GDRX).

tagline: GoDaddy is the world's largest cloud platform dedicated to helping companies build their web presence.
description: GoDaddy powers the world's largest cloud platform dedicated to small, independent ventures. GoDaddy's mission is to give its customers the tools, insights and the people to transform their ideas and personal initiative into success.

tagline: Electronic Arts offers digital interactive entertainment.
description: Electronic Arts Inc. (EA) is a global leader in digital interactive entertainment. EA develops and delivers games, content and online services for Internet-connected consoles, mobile devices and personal computers. EA is recognized for a portfolio of critically acclaimed, high-quality blockbuster brands such as The Sims™, Madden NFL, EA SPORTS™ FIFA, Battlefield™, Dragon Age™, and Plants vs. Zombies™.

tagline: eHarmony’s platform matches singles seeking long-term relationships.
description: eHarmony uses relationship science to match singles seeking long-term relationships. Its service presents users with compatible matches based on key dimensions of personality that are scientifically proven to predict highly successful long-term relationships.

tagline: Actifio provides copy data management and data protection solutions to enterprises and service providers
description: Actifio provides data protection solutions to enterprises and service providers. The Company's software platform virtualizes non-production data and enables a wide array of data protection functions such as backup and restore, business continuity and disaster recovery performed in one application interface.

tagline: HireVue provides the most comprehensive AI-driven talent assessment suite and video interviewing solutions.
description: HireVue is where hiring happens – transforming the way organizations discover, engage, and hire the best talent. Connecting companies and candidates anytime, anywhere, HireVue’s industry leading end-to-end hiring platform features video interviewing, assessments, and conversational AI.

tagline: Grupa Pracuj is a leading provider of solutions to assist companies in recruiting, retaining, and developing employees.
description: Grupa Pracuj (The Pracuj Group) is a leader in the digital recruitment market, operating for two decades in Poland and Ukraine. The company owns the brands Pracuj.pl, Robota.ua, eRecruiter, creating a digital ecosystem for the HR world. The Pracuj Group’s team have awarded it with the title of “The Best Employer” nine times in the prestigious international AON Hewitt ranking. The Pracuj Group went public in 2021 on the Warsaw Stock Exchange (WSE:GPP).

tagline: Flix is a mobility provider, offering new alternatives for convenient, affordable and environmentally-friendly travel.
The platform for services business.
description: Certinia (formerly FinancialForce) delivers a Services-as-a-Business platform that powers and connects all aspects of services operations, from services estimation and delivery to customer success management and financial planning and accounting.

tagline: Brillen is a global eyewear platform.
description: Brillen provides a customer acquisition platform and proprietary eyewear to a network of independent opticians across Germany, Austria, Spain, Poland, United Kingdom, and the United States.

tagline: Twilio strives to be the customer layer for the internet, powering engaging interactions companies build for their customers.
description: Twilio’s mission is to fuel the future of communications. Developers and businesses use Twilio to make communications relevant and contextual by embedding messaging, voice and video capabilities directly into their software applications. Twilio is headquartered in San Francisco with other offices in Bogotá, Dublin, Hong Kong, London, Madrid, Malmö, Mountain View, Munich, New York City, Singapore, and Tallinn. Twilio went public in 2016 on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: TWLO).

tagline: Xero provides cloud-based accounting software.
description: Xero is listed on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX: XRO).

tagline: SiteMinder is the world's leading open hotel commerce platform.
description: SiteMinder is the world’s leading open hotel commerce platform, ranked among technology pioneers for opening up every hotel’s access to online commerce. SiteMinder went public on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX: SDR) in 2021.

tagline: TOA is the leading provider of cloud-based field service solutions that optimize the last mile of customer service for enterprises worldwide.
description: TOA Technologies was acquired by Oracle in 2014.

tagline: LinkedIn is an online professional networking platform.
description: LinkedIn was acquired by Microsoft in 2016.

tagline: Merkle is a leading technology-enabled, data-driven performance marketing agency.
description: Merkle was acquired by Dentsu Aegis Network in 2016.

tagline: iPipeline provides sales and distribution software for the insurance and financial services markets.
description: iPipeline was acquired by Thoma Bravo in 2015.

tagline: Interactive Brokers provides automated electronic broker and market maker services
description: Interactive Brokers is a global electronic broker, offering a low cost platform with highly regarded trading technology to professional traders, and a market maker, offering liquidity for equities, options, futures and FX instruments.

tagline: NewVoiceMedia offers cloud contact center and inside sales solutions.
description: NewVoiceMedia powers customer connections that transform businesses globally. The company’s award-winning cloud customer contact platform revolutionizes the way organizations connect with their customers worldwide, enabling them to deliver a personalized and unique customer service experience and drive a more effective sales team. NewVoiceMedia ensures complete flexibility, scalability, and reliability. Vonage Holdings Corp. (NYSE: VG) acquired NewVoiceMedia in 2018.

tagline: Minted is an online design marketplace of independent artists.
description: Minted is an Innovation-led empowerment company, committed to discovering and fostering the world’s untapped creative talent and bringing it to market. Using Minted’s crowdsourcing technology, consumers are empowered to vote for the designs they love and want to see sold, ensuring that Minted always sells continuously fresh and trend-forward products. The winning designs are manufactured by Minted, enabling artists from around the world to sell their work while letting Minted do the rest. Since launching in 2007, the company has expanded to serve consumers in new categories including wall art, textiles, digital content, and home furnishings. Minted also builds traditional retail distribution for its independent artist community, partnering with major retailers and consumer products brands.

tagline: Groupon is a global market leader for daily deals for consumer goods and local services
description: Groupon provides an online service that leverages the collective buying power of crowds to help consumers discover new local businesses and receive great values on their services.

tagline: Envestnet provides technology-enabled products and services for financial advisors.
description: Envestnet went public in 2010 on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: ENV).

tagline: Humu is an HR technology platform to help employees build better habits at work.
description: Humu focuses on helping organizations improve employee communication and collaboration skills such as managerial effectiveness, DE&I, organizational agility, and more. Humu has developed a technology platform that leverages AI and proprietary, evidence-based content to drive employee behavior change through “nudges.” Humu combines Nobel-prize winning science and technology to pinpoint which behaviors and people skills leaders, managers, and employees need to be effective and help drive organizational change. Humu was acquired by Perceptyx in 2023.

tagline: tastyworks is a brokerage firm, creating and leading a financial revolution for the do-it-yourself investor.
description: tastytrade is one of the most-watched online financial networks, engaging investors and traders with daily, live, cost-free and commercial free programming. tastytrade is also the parent company to tastyworks, a brokerage firm creating and leading a financial revolution for the do-it-yourself investor and to Quiet Foundation, a data science-driven, fee-free investment advisory service. tastytrade and its companies focus on empowering the individual investor through content, technology and know-how. tastytrade was acquired by IG Group Holdings in 2021.

tagline: Perfecto offers a cloud-based mobile application development platform.
description: Perfecto’s Continuous Quality Lab enables DevOps teams to accelerate development, achieve continuous testing and monitoring, and drive fast feedback through actionable analytics for web, mobile, and IoT apps. Perfecto’s cloud-based Continuous Quality Lab as their digital app test environment and for authoring test automation executed on real browsers, smartphones, and devices under real end-user conditions.

tagline: Qonto is a leading European business finance solution.
description: Qonto helps SMBs, and freelancers manage their daily banking and finances needs. The company offers a broad range of services, including bank accounts, card issuing (virtual and physical), and software tools for managing and automating finance workflows such as bookkeeping and expenses management.

tagline: A cloud-native banking platform working to empower small and medium-sized businesses.
description: Allica is a digitally-native bank dedicated to serving and supporting Britain’s established small and medium businesses (SMEs), a vital and underserved segment of the economy. Allica and its proprietary, cloud-native banking platform are specifically suited to handle the complexity associated with established SMEs. The platform digitizes and automates many components of the end-to-end lending journey, which drives significant operational efficiency and enables best-in-class decision turnaround times, a deeply valuable proposition to SMEs and the growing UK broker community. Allica received its banking license in 2019.

tagline: AppNexus enables and optimizes the real-time sale and purchase of digital advertising.
description: AppNexus was acquired by AT&T in 2018.

tagline: AxiomSL provides risk data management and regulatory reporting solutions for the financial industry.
description: AxiomSL is a global leader in regulatory reporting, data and risk management solutions. The company’s unique enterprise data management (EDM) platform empowers firms to address data governance and risk aggregation while delivering the analytics, workflow automation, validation, audit functionality and reporting required by multiple stakeholders across global and local regulations. AxiomSL rebranded to Adenza in 2022.

tagline: Built offers construction and real estate solutions for better financial management.
description: Built empowers the entire construction finance ecosystem with the tools they need to make better lending and spending decisions. The cloud-based platform is designed to improve the flow of capital through the construction ecosystem. By connecting all key stakeholders involved in the construction financing process in real-time, Built helps mitigate risk, power faster draws and payments, ensure compliance, and inspire customer loyalty.

tagline: Celonis provides companies a modern way to run their business processes entirely on data and intelligence.
description: Celonis provides companies with a modern way to run their business processes entirely on data and intelligence. To help companies unlock their full execution capacity, the Celonis Execution Management System provides a set of applications, and developer studio and platform capabilities for business executives and users who seek to eliminate corporate inefficiencies.

tagline: Facebook’s mission is to give people the power to share and make the world more open and connected.
description: Facebook and its parent company Meta build technologies that help people connect, find communities and grow businesses. TCV invested in Facebook in 2010 and exited in 2018.

tagline: Fandango is an online movie ticketing service.
description: Fandango was acquired by Comcast in 2007.

tagline: Green Dot is a provider of prepaid and stored value products and services.
description: Green Dot went public in 2010 on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: GDOT).

tagline: Miro empowers teams to communicate and collaborate across formats, tools, channels, and timezones — without the constraints of physical location, meeting space, and whiteboards.
description: Miro is an online, visual collaboration platform designed to unlock creativity and accelerate innovation among teams of all kinds. The platform’s infinite canvas enables teams to lead engaging workshops and meetings, design products, brainstorm ideas, and more.

tagline: Mollie offers world-class financial services that give everybody the opportunity to GROW.
description: Mollie is a pioneer in the payments industry. The company is one of the fastest growing payment processors in Europe. Mollie facilitates companies of all sizes to scale and grow by using different payment methods. With the help of a simple and clear payments-API, Mollie can offer multiple payment methods with just one click. Mollie’s mission is to simplify complex financial services for companies of all sizes, to become the world’s most loved PSP.

tagline: Nerdy is transforming the way people learn.
description: Nerdy is a leading curated gig economy and direct-to-consumer platform for learning and live online instruction. Nerdy’s mission is to transform the way people learn through technology. The company’s purpose-built proprietary platform leverages AI to connect learners of all ages to experts and deliver superior value on both sides of the network. Nerdy’s comprehensive learning destination provides learning experiences across different subjects and multiple formats — including 1:1 tutoring, small and large live group classes and asynchronous self-study. Nerdy’s flagship business is Varsity Tutors, one of the nation’s largest platforms for live online tutoring and classes. Nerdy went public in 2021 on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: NRDY).

tagline: Newsela supercharges reading engagement and learning in every subject.
description: Newsela takes authentic, real world content from trusted sources and makes it instruction ready for K-12 classrooms. Each text is published at five reading levels, so content is accessible to every learner. Today, millions of teachers and students have registered with Newsela for content that’s personalized to student interests, accessible to everyone, aligned to instructional standards, and attached to activities and reporting that hold teachers accountable for instruction and students accountable for their work.

tagline: Payoneer is the world’s go-to partner for digital commerce, everywhere.
description: From borderless payments to boundless growth, Payoneer promises any business, in any market, the technology, connections and confidence to participate and flourish in the new global economy. Since 2005, Payoneer has been imagining and engineering a truly global ecosystem so the entire world can realize its potential. Powering growth for customers ranging from aspiring entrepreneurs in emerging markets to the world’s leading digital brands, Payoneer offers a universe of opportunities, open to you. Payoneer went public in 2021 on the NASDAQ Stock Market (NASDAQ: PAYO).

tagline: Rapid7 provides cyber security data and analytics solutions.
description: Rapid7 powers the practice of SecOps by delivering shared visibility, analytics, and automation that unites security, IT, and DevOps teams. The Rapid7 Insight platform empowers these teams to jointly manage and reduce risk, detect and contain attackers, and analyze and optimize operations. Rapid7 technology, services, and research drive vulnerability management, application security, incident detection and response, and log management. Rapid7 went public in 2015 on the NASDAQ Stock Market (NASDAQ: RPD).

tagline: Relex helps retailers and consumer brands unify their planning, from demand and merchandise to supply chain and operations, for maximum customer satisfaction at the lowest operating cost.
description: RELEX Solutions’ retail optimization software is built for the age of Living Retail, where change is the only constant. The company helps retailers adapt to every future, faster. RELEX’s cloud-native Living Retail Platform delivers pragmatic AI across all retail functions and at retail scale, eradicating siloes, rigidities and inefficiencies along the way. It offers a fast lane to value that builds from a foundation of radically improved demand forecasting and supply chain optimization. RELEX customers leverage this enhanced supply chain visibility optimize their space, allocation, workforce, promotion, and markdown strategies, all within a unified platform.

tagline: SeatGeek offers a mobile-focused ticket platform.
description: SeatGeek is a leading mobile-focused ticket platform that enables fans to buy and sell tickets for sports, concert, and theater events. With industry-leading mobile ticketing apps, a fan-friendly user experience and its proprietary Deal Score technology that helps fans identify the best ticket values for a given event, SeatGeek is transforming the way that fans buy and sell tickets to their favorite events. SeatGeek Enterprise – the company’s primary ticketing platform – is used by partners throughout the U.S.

tagline: Splunk is a market leader in analyzing machine data to deliver Operational Intelligence for security, IT and the business.
description: Splunk software provides the enterprise machine data fabric that drives digital transformation. Splunk went public in 2012 on the NASDAQ Stock Market (NASDAQ: SPLK).

tagline: TourRadar is the world’s largest online travel marketplace for multi-day tours.
description: TourRadar provides travelers with a trusted online marketplace to find and book life-enriching experiences worldwide. TourRadar was the first to transition multi-day tours to an online marketplace. TourRadar is headquartered in Vienna, Austria, with additional offices across Europe, North America, and Australia.

tagline: Zepz is powering two leading global payments brands: WorldRemit and Sendwave.
description: Zepz represents brands that disrupted an industry previously dominated by offline legacy players by taking international money transfers online – making global digital payments fairer, faster, and more flexible. On the sending side, Zepz brands are 100% digital (cashless), increasing convenience and enhancing security. For those receiving money, the brands offer a wide range of options including bank deposit, cash collection, mobile airtime top-up and mobile money.

tagline: Tripadvisor is the world's largest travel site.
description: Tripadvisor helps hundreds of millions of people each month become better travellers, from planning to booking to taking a trip. Travellers across the globe use the Tripadvisor site and app to discover where to stay, what to do and where to eat based on guidance from those who have been there before. Tripadvisor makes planning easy no matter the trip type.

tagline: OSIsoft software connects sensor-based data, operations, and people to enable real-time intelligence.
description: OSIsoft, a global leader in operational intelligence, delivers an open enterprise infrastructure to connect sensor-based data, operations, and people to enable real-time and actionable insights. As the maker of the PI System, OSIsoft empowers companies across a range of industries in activities such as exploration, extraction, production, generation, process, and discrete manufacturing, distribution, and services to leverage streaming data to optimize and enrich their businesses.

tagline: Act-On Software is the growth marketing automation leader.
description: Act-On Software is offering solutions that empower marketers to move beyond the lead and engage targets at every step of the customer lifecycle. Act-On makes customer data actionable so marketers can strategize smart, effective solutions to grow their businesses and generate higher customer lifetime value — all with the fastest time-to-value.

tagline: Trulioo is a leader in global identity verification.
description: Trulioo is a leading global identity verification company, building trust online so that businesses and consumers can transact safely and securely. Trulioo’s platform provides real-time verification through a single API integration. Organizations rely on Trulioo’s identity verification solution, GlobalGateway, to help meet their business and compliance requirements and automate due diligence and fraud prevention workflows. Trulioo’s mission is to help provide every person on the planet with a digital identity to enable access to basic financial services and support.

tagline: Prodege is a cutting-edge marketing and consumer insights platform.
description: Prodege leverages its global audience of reward program members to power its business solutions. These innovative offerings enable leading brands and agencies to gather insights and market to their target audiences. Through deep consumer profiling, partners can more effectively acquire new customers, boost engagement, increase revenue, and drive brand loyalty and product adoption. In addition to signature consumer rewards platform Swagbucks, Prodege owns and operates MyPoints (acquired in 2016), Shopathome (2017), InboxDollars (2019), ySense (2019), CouponCause (2020), and Upromise (2020). TCV's ownership in Prodege was acquired by Great Hill Partners in 2021.

tagline: K12 provides digital learning platforms for students and school districts.
description: K12 provides online education solutions for students in pre-K through 12th grade. The company is driving innovation and advancing the quality of education by delivering digital learning platforms and technology to students and school districts across the globe.

tagline: IQMS is a leading manufacturing ERP software and manufacturing execution system (MES) authority.
description: IQMS is a manufacturing software provider that uniquely combines ERP and MES functionality to give manufacturers a comprehensive end-to-end suite for running the business, backed by the real-time performance and scalability that companies demand. Developed specifically for mid-market repetitive, discrete and batch process manufacturers, IQMS provides robust capabilities for addressing strict customer and regulatory certification and compliance. IQMS achieves this by delivering traditional ERP functionality for accounting, sales orders, material requirements, inventory, and purchasing, plus extended native features for CRM, human resources, production scheduling, shop floor control, warehouse and quality modules. With offices across North America, Europe, and Asia, IQMS serves manufacturers around the world. IQMS was acquired by Dassault Systemes in 2019.

tagline: HomeAway is an online vacation rental marketplace.
description: HomeAway is an online marketplace that connects families, friends, and groups of all sizes with people who have vacation homes for rent. With over a million listings across hundreds of countries, HomeAway has a property for any need. HomeAway was acquired by Expedia in 2015.

tagline: Expedia is the world’s largest online travel company.
description: Expedia was acquired by InterActive Corp. in 2003.

tagline: ExactTarget is a global provider of digital marketing SaaS solutions.
description: ExactTarget provides on-demand email marketing and interactive marketing solutions that empower organizations to communicate with customers through email, mobile, social media, web, and marketing automation. ExactTarget was acquired by Salesforce in 2013.

tagline: Dollar Shave Club is a shaving and grooming ecommerce company.
description: Dollar Shave Club was acquired by Unilever in 2016.

tagline: Capsule is a healthcare technology business rebuilding the pharmacy.
description: Capsule is rebuilding the pharmacy industry from the inside out with an emotionally resonant experience and technology that enables customized outcomes for doctors, hospitals, insurers, and manufacturers. Capsule has designed every aspect of the pharmacy experience to give consumers and partners the peace of mind of having their health looked after.
